spoken_prompt: Ship it.
expected_text: Ship it.

spoken_prompt: New line and start a bullet list.
expected_text: New line and start a bullet list.

spoken_prompt: The build is green and ready for review.
expected_text: The build is green and ready for review.

spoken_prompt: Please retry the request after ten seconds.
expected_text: Please retry the request after ten seconds.

spoken_prompt: Show the latest error message in the terminal.
expected_text: Show the latest error message in the terminal.

spoken_prompt: Please summarize the meeting notes and send them to Alex before noon.
expected_text: Please summarize the meeting notes and send them to Alex before noon.

spoken_prompt: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog near the river bank.
expected_text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog near the river bank.

spoken_prompt: Move tomorrow's design review to Friday afternoon and invite the backend team.
expected_text: Move tomorrow's design review to Friday afternoon and invite the backend team.

spoken_prompt: This note should be concise but include the risks and next steps.
expected_text: This note should be concise but include the risks and next steps.

spoken_prompt: Thanks for the update, I will take a look and respond by the end of the day.
expected_text: Thanks for the update, I will take a look and respond by the end of the day.

spoken_prompt: Run cargo test dash dash workspace and fix the failing snapshot.
expected_text: Run cargo test --workspace and fix the failing snapshot.
accepted_alternatives: Run cargo test dash dash workspace and fix the failing snapshot.

spoken_prompt: Create a Rust function named parse config that returns result option user ID comma error.
expected_text: Create a Rust function named parse_config that returns Result<Option<UserId>, Error>.

spoken_prompt: Use serde JSON from string and propagate errors with question mark.
expected_text: Use serde_json::from_str and propagate errors with ?.

spoken_prompt: The bug is in source slash whisper slash providers slash whisper underscore CPP dot RS.
expected_text: The bug is in src/whisper/providers/whisper_cpp.rs.

spoken_prompt: Set HTTP status code four twenty nine when the rate limit bucket is exhausted.
expected_text: Set HTTP status code 429 when the rate limit bucket is exhausted.

spoken_prompt: Add a SQL migration for user underscore sessions with created at and expires at.
expected_text: Add a SQL migration for user_sessions with created_at and expires_at.

spoken_prompt: In TypeScript prefer read only arrays and avoid any in the public API.
expected_text: In TypeScript, prefer readonly arrays and avoid any in the public API.

spoken_prompt: Git rebase main resolve conflicts then push with lease.
expected_text: git rebase main, resolve conflicts, then push --force-with-lease.

spoken_prompt: Write a React component called command palette with aria expanded and role combo box.
expected_text: Write a React component called CommandPalette with aria-expanded and role=combobox.

spoken_prompt: Use cube control logs deployment slash API dash server dash F in the staging namespace.
expected_text: Use kubectl logs deployment/api-server -f in the staging namespace.

spoken_prompt: The environment variable is database URL all caps with an underscore.
expected_text: The environment variable is DATABASE_URL.

spoken_prompt: Call the endpoint post slash V one slash audio slash transcriptions with multipart form data.
expected_text: Call POST /v1/audio/transcriptions with multipart form data.

spoken_prompt: Return a JSON error body with code rate limit exceeded and retry after seconds.
expected_text: Return a JSON error body with code rate_limit_exceeded and retry_after_seconds.

spoken_prompt: Quote this exact phrase colon fast local dictation comma not cloud transcription.
expected_text: Quote this exact phrase: fast local dictation, not cloud transcription.

spoken_prompt: Can you confirm whether the microphone permission dialog appeared question mark
expected_text: Can you confirm whether the microphone permission dialog appeared?

spoken_prompt: This benchmark should separate recording latency from model inference so that engine changes do not hide regressions in text injection or clipboard handling.
expected_text: This benchmark should separate recording latency from model inference so that engine changes do not hide regressions in text injection or clipboard handling.

spoken_prompt: When the push to talk key is released the daemon should finalize the wave file quickly hand it to a warm local model and inject the result without blocking the next recording.
expected_text: When the push to talk key is released the daemon should finalize the wave file quickly hand it to a warm local model and inject the result without blocking the next recording.

spoken_prompt: The reproduction steps are open the settings panel choose the whisper CPP provider start recording for three seconds and then release the push to talk key while the editor has focus.
expected_text: The reproduction steps are open the settings panel, choose the whisper.cpp provider, start recording for three seconds, and then release the push-to-talk key while the editor has focus.

spoken_prompt: I reviewed the trace output and the slowest phase appears to be model startup rather than audio finalization or clipboard paste.
expected_text: I reviewed the trace output and the slowest phase appears to be model startup rather than audio finalization or clipboard paste.

spoken_prompt: Please file a follow up issue for persistent model loading if the warm transcription latency remains above the target after the baseline run.
expected_text: Please file a follow-up issue for persistent model loading if the warm transcription latency remains above the target after the baseline run.
